## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] Manually tested the affected flow on my platform
- [ ] Updated README / CONTRIBUTING / inline comments if behavior changed
- [ ] New dependencies justified (Plume Hub aims to stay small)
